Loading rules: Use Aspose.Words.Loading.LoadOptions to explicitly load a TXT file as a Word document.
Ensure the callback is assigned after loading the document (or before hyphenation is triggered).
Saving/Export rules: Ensure the document is loaded with new Document(path) and saved with doc.Save(path).
Layout rules: Save the document to a layout format (e.g., DOCX) because plain‑text files cannot retain hyphenation information.
Pass a readable Stream (e.g., File.OpenRead) to Hyphenation.RegisterDictionary; the layout engine will dispose it.
